calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-457 first-class actor-critic action-learning ON/OFF validation (A0-A3 cotrain x SF-critic + bias_head control + local_view/oracle/random anchors; D0+D3; foraging teacher)
items.note: MECH-457 ON/OFF validation sanctioned by failure_autopsy_734-737-conversion-ceiling-competence_2026-07-11 as the next test after the actor-critic substrate landed (ree_core/action_learning/actor_critic.py, 2026-07-12). RPE teacher = FORAGING reward (user-confirmed 2026-07-12; substrate benefit-harm teacher NOT used -> no ARC-030 grounding phase). 8 arms: A0-A3 = cotrain_encoder{F,T} x use_sf_critic{F,T} + bias_head_baseline (724 all-ON incompetence control) + local_view_greedy (738 fair denominator, 48.05@D3) + greedy_oracle + random_walk. D0+D3 (x734 rungs), seeds 42/43/44, phased P0 warmup -> P1 A2C actor-critic (GAE; cotrain adds latent_stack to optimizer + live z_world, frozen detaches) -> P2 unshaped foraging eval. DV = capability_eval foraging_competence vs 1.0 floor, strict majority @D3. PROMOTES/DEMOTES NOTHING: route to /failure-autopsy (accepts PASS target) before any governance action / MECH-457 promotion. deeper_than_action_learning self-route -> RE-AUTOPSY not a lettered floor re-test (734/737 RESOLVED_BY_FANOUT refusal stands). Smoke PASS + validate_experiments --strict OK 2026-07-12. Arm-fingerprint self-mint in-run (reuse-eligible, include_driver_script_in_hash=False); separate baseline mint SKIPPED -- first-of-lineage with machine_affinity=any (a cloud mint is not reusable by a Mac run and vice versa) + the OFF/warmup recipe co-evolves with the encoder under test; the free in-run self-mint banks all 8 cells for any strictly-later successor.

items.title: MECH-456 functional-rebinding P-B directed-traversal RETEST-after-substrate: brake-permitted single re-run (directed_tour_p0_coverage=True) so the DV1/DV2 6/6 near-PASS is counted
items.note: Brake-permitted retest-after-substrate of the V3-EXQ-733a Leg P-B directed-traversal design (single re-run; supersedes V3-EXQ-733a). EVIDENCE, claim-tagged functional test of MECH-456 (entities.rebinding_under_perturbation; candidate / v3_pending -> PROMOTES NOTHING by itself). RE-DERIVE BRAKE: FIRED on MECH-456 (2 non_contributory readiness autopsies: failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-733_2026-07-10, failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-733a_2026-07-11) but RELEASED per /queue-experiment Step 2.5b rule 1 -- the named upstream substrate is now BUILT: the functional-harness fix landed on ree-v3 main commit 9cd896c (2026-07-11). The brake's refusal scope is the P-A survival-onboarding axis ONLY (its declared null fired; NOT re-queued). This P-B re-run is the explicitly routed productive path (733a autopsy sec.8/sec.9): P-B already cleared every mechanism criterion (DV1 6/6, DV2 6/6, both_pass=True, binder converged 6/6, overtakes 62-808/seed -- strongest affirmative rebinding signal to date) and was blocked ONLY by a granularity-blind, survival-coupled P0-coverage floor (min P0 region visits 9<10 on one starved seed 43 on the K=16 lattice). SINGLE change vs the 733a-b P-B script: directed_tour_p0_coverage=True is passed into H.run_functional_test_seed. During P0 ONLY this suppresses the health-death `done` truncation so the scripted teleport tour runs its full step budget; the harness's existing teleport-entry accrual then makes P0 per-region coverage guaranteed BY CONSTRUCTION (mirroring how the teleport already guaranteed P1 overtakes). The binder-training/prototype mechanism that passed DV1/DV2 6/6 is UNCHANGED; only the P0-starving truncation is removed. Pairs with the K-scaled readiness floor min_region_visits_floor(K=16)=3 (the fixed K=4 floor of 10 over-demanded on K=16). Everything else P-B verbatim: COLD V3-EXQ-733 agent, softened survival (hazard_harm/proximity_harm/hazard_food_attraction -> 0), finer lattice G 2->4 (K=16), scripted teleport tour every 8 steps; P0=40, P1=25, steps=120, SEEDS=[42..47]. No ree_core change (harness-level measurement over the trained-then-frozen learned cross_stream_binder). DV1 tracks-truth-above-shuffle + DV2 graded non-saturating re-acq latency (ON vs FROZEN, one shared trajectory/seed). EXPECTED: readiness now met -> functional_rebinding_supported -> counted SUPPORT for MECH-456. NULL (declared): with overtakes AND P0 coverage guaranteed, DV1/DV2 failing on >=4/6 seeds => binder does not GENERALLY track the true competitor => WEAKENS MECH-456; substrate_not_ready_requeue only if the binder fails to converge (non_contributory, not a verdict). MECH-456 stays candidate/v3_pending regardless (V3-pending gate). Bears on (cited, NOT tagged): MECH-269, MECH-270, ARC-006, MECH-045, INV-002. Smoke: py_compile OK; validate_experiments --strict --paths OK; dry-run PASS end-to-end (regions_covered 16/16, min_overtakes=28, min_region_visits_floor=3 printed; self-routes substrate_not_ready only because the 3-episode dry-run P0 gives 2<3 -- expected for tiny P0, won't recur at P0=40 where the autopsy smoke gave min 22; no dry manifest leak). Route result to /governance (writes MECH-456 evidence_quality_note; marks 733a legs reviewed non_contributory).
